seo.title: Lost in the Forest of Composable Commerce? | Content Cucumber Research
seo.meta_description: Free research paper comparing composable vs embedded commerce platforms. Year-1 costs, timelines, team requirements for commercetools and VTEX.
seo.og_description: Independent research comparing commercetools and VTEX. Assembly costs, time-to-market, and team size analysis for enterprise commerce decisions.

thankyou.title: Check your inbox
thankyou.text: The research paper is on its way. You'll receive a download link within a few minutes.

data.title:
Lost in the Forest of
Composable Commerce?
data.subtitle: An independent analysis of modular assembly vs embedded commerce. Comparing commercetools and VTEX across cost, time-to-market, team requirements, and enterprise capabilities.
bullets: Find out why modular commerce stacks cost up to 2.3x more in Year One
See the real timeline gap: one approach launches in 6 months, the other takes two years
Learn how many engineers you'll need to keep the lights on (the number will surprise you)
Understand which enterprise capabilities come built-in and which you're building from scratch
Get a clear framework for deciding between commercetools and VTEX for your organization
data.authors: By Brent Peterson and Isaac Morey, Content Cucumber
data.form_subtitle: Free. No commitment. Straight to your inbox.
